# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

---
services:
  - name: users-api
    url: users-api.com
    port: 80
  - name: products-api
    url: products-api.com
    port: 80

routes:
  - name: users-route
    paths:
      - /users
    service: users-api
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-validation
  - name: products-route
    paths:
      - /products
    service: products-api
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-validation

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
  - name: request-validation
    config:
      schema:
        type: object
        properties:
          name:
            type: string
          email:
            type: string
          password:
            type: string
---
